entry.title: Compensation Salary Structure
entry.content: In SF Compensation, can we configure salary structures using a different field e.g. Function, Department, or Business Unit instead of Legal Entity? Is it possible to segment salary structures based on these categories rather than the default Legal Entity configuration?

entry.title: Career Site Builder on changing hte company name.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’d like to inquire about any potential impact when changing the company name via Career Site Builder > Site Settings. Our current setup reflects "Company A," and we’re planning to update it to "Company B" due to a recent acquisition.

Aside from expected changes to URLs and the need to generate a new SSL certificate for the updated name, are there any other aspects I should be mindful of before proceeding with the change?

Appreciate your insights!

Best regards,
Rev

entry.title: Re: PO sucontracting BoM update with BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Andrea,

are you able to achieve this?

If you can please share the what parameter are you passing in BAPI Table parameter (POCOMPONENTS and POCOMPONENTSX).

PO_ITEM = 0010, SCHED_LINE = 0001 (For Line item 10) ITEM_NO = 0010 (Also tried 0001)
ENTRY_QUANTITY = 10.110
CHANGE_ID = 'U'
REQ_QUAN = 10.110

In POCOMPONENTSX

PO_ITEM = 0010, SCHED_LINE = 0001 (For Line item 10) ITEM_NO = 0010 (Also tried 0001)

PO_ITEMX = 'X'
SCHED_LINEX = 'X'
ITEM_NOX = 'X'
ENTRY_QUANTITY = 'X' 
CHANGE_ID = 'X'         REQ_QUAN = 'X'

But not able to update the quantity field at both entry_quantity & require_quantity.


Appreciate for your help on this. I am passing all required parameters but not able to update the BOM components.

Mahesh

entry.title: Compensation excess budget field
entry.content: Is it possible to configure an additional budget field that allows manual upload of approved excess budget per Legal Entity, Group, or Division, and use it as the basis for budget flagging (e.g., within or exceeding the Performance Bonus budget)? Additionally, can this field be included in the calculation of the Total Budget displayed in the worksheet’s Budget widget?

entry.title: Re: Handling Field Length Differences in SAP Ariba – SAP ERP including S/4 HANA Integration Using CI
entry.content:
Hi  @Francois-Xavier, I understand where you are coming from - but as you are likely aware, the Ariba solution long pre-dates the purchase by SAP. To change the existing code base and data model would negatively impact any existing customers and configurations performed over time to manage field lengths and utilised capability to suit their needs. We've tried to chip away at areas we can change for some time, but a complete rewrite is just not feasible. 

That's not to say that SAP Ariba Procurement will never change! As you are likely aware, SAP Ariba are working away at developing our next generation of solutions - starting with SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition, the newly released SAP Ariba Buying, Procurement Expansion Package and of course, Central Invoice Management. For these solutions, alignment to SAP ERP - specifically S/4HANA Public Cloud (or aka Cloud ERP) - has been the first and foremost consideration. 

This is not the end of the journey. These solutions will evolve into new product offerings and expand to support additional ERPs (SAP and non-SAP), where our baseline is SAP ODM (One Domain Model) based around MDI to leverage master data replication cross solutions. Our future solutions will become more tightly coupled, leveraging centralised supporting services and shared view of master data and transactional data handling. 

For our existing customers, their time will come to be able to leverage these solutions and this shared master and transactional data approach. 

Thanks to @DevPalanimuthu and @jay_rajagopal2 for your work on documenting this topic!

entry.title: Re: Missing selection box column on UI Table ABAP RAP
entry.content: Hi All,

entry.title: Re: Missing selection box column on UI Table ABAP RAP
entry.content: Hi All, I managed to find the answer but i am not sure how to explain.

entry.title: Is It possible to replicate custom MDF from EC to ECP in PTP Employee Data Replication?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to inquire about the possibility to replicate data from custom MDF in EC to Infotype 0057 (Membership Fees) of Malaysia in ECP in PTP Employee Data Replication.

The reason we do not want to use mash-up screen of IT0057 in EC is that the client requirement wants the employee to submit the Membership Fees deduction requests in EC for workflow approval. Once the request is approved, the data is expected to replicate/flow to IT0057 of ECP for payroll processing.

If we build a custom MDF in EC for this scenario, will the PTP Employee Data Replication support the replication of data from the custom MDF in EC to IT0057 in ECP? Or do we need to build custom integration e.g. csv file export from EC and import into ECP? or API integration?

Any advice would be much appreciated. Thanks.

 

Regards,

TP

entry.title: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content:
Hello, experts.

I would like to ask a question about Professional Service Module.
I'm now inspecting SAP S/4HANA Cloud-Public Edition and facing a problem with Project Construction.

In my former project (That was installing project of Private Edition) , we could make multi layer WBS Element in my memory. However, on the Public Edition, there's no settings to implement them into our Test system.

Is it right that we cannot make Project which contains multi layered WBS Element?
I heard we should EPPM to get the function.

Best regards.
Y_T

entry.title: Re: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis...
entry.content:
Hi Farkas Oliver,

I ping you in MS Chat, if still have any questions, we can have a call. 

Best regards,

Tikeer

entry.title: How to restrict the authorization of users to post Supplier Invoices.
entry.content:
How to disable the Post button in supplier invoice apps and restrict certain user from posting a Supplier Invoice?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the authorization of users to post Su...
entry.content:
Hi,

For your question, please refer to the below information for more details. Hope it helps.

1. Execute App Maintain Business Roles, create a custom business role by copying standard role SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT

2. Select these three catalogs and remove them:

  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_MC
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_PC
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_SCHEDULE_PC
  •  

3. Click the Save button.

4. If the user has SAP_BR_RECEIVING_SPECIALIST role assigned, then catalog SAP_LO_BC_LFE_CRT_INTF_PC should also be removed from this role.

5. If the user has SAP_BR_AA_ACCOUNTANT role assigned, then the following two catalogs should also be removed from this role:

  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_DOC_PROC_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_POST_REG_PC

6. Open a parked invoice or create a new one

Now the user has no authorization to post an invoice, only to save and park invoices.

 

Note:

  1. Removing the mentioned Business Roles above will also remove access to those Apps that were possible to Enter with the same roles.
  2. Business Catalog SAP_FIN_BC_AA_POST_REG_PC supports the features of creating Supplier Invoices since CE2502.

 

Thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: How to issue learning after additional Job Location ID's included in the RULES tab
entry.content:
An update was made to Program NAAP_AG_NDIS_ELN_25/26.

Extra sites were added into the Rule.  Since this update, it appears that the learning program is still not being pushed to the required sites (Locations) that were added into the Rule.

Please assist to rectify this.

entry.title: Control by Field Status Variant when executing Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I run Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous), does the control of  Field Status Variant per account work?
I tried it and it didn't work, so I would like to check.

Example:

When Cost Center is hidden, if you try to go to register Cost Center with the API, it will be registered.
Ideally, Cost Center would not be registered, but would be posted without error.

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Email Notification Recipient
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Please help assist to check who are/intended roles of the email notification on the attached, some users are not receiving these email notifications and some also seemed to not consistently receiving these.


The user who consistently receiving these will be retiring, we just need to make sure that we do not PERSON_NAME out these notifications.


Please refer to the attached file "Email Notifications.docx" for sample notifications.


Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Recipient
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Greetings from SAP Support.

For the Cloud System maintenance/outage/downtime Notifications, the subscription is configured in Cloud Systems Notification Subscriptions (Get Notified) application (Please see KBA 2896942 and 2900069)

Your Super/Cloud administrators can manage (delete/edit/modify) Cloud Notification Subscriptions for S-users refer to KBA2896942, please reach to Super/Cloud administrators for checking the recipient of the email notification.

S-user can also subscribe to SAP Customer Data Cloud outage notification emails via SAP for Me at https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/getNotified

You will find further details in KBA3481022 - Different types of notifications - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Hi Venkatesh,We also facing similar issue for ecc to...
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you still seeing the issue? If yes, could you please share more details about the logs? So that we can look into it deeper.
In the meantime, can you please check if below KBA helps?
3098090 - Stuck in phase MAIN_NEWBAS/PARRUN_CONF_REFCHAR during S/4HANA conversion

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: chillSAP × Next-Gen Boost 若手LT大会 開催！
entry.content:
こんにちは、chillSAP運営チームです。

イベントでの登壇、チャレンジしてみたいけど、ちょっとハードル高い…
そう思っている若手のみなさん、その第一歩を踏み出してみませんか？

ひさびさにやります！
若手のためのLT大会！

 

イベントの目的

SAP Inside Track Tokyo などの大きなイベントでは、ベテランの登壇者が多くて少し気後れしてしまう…
そんなSAPに関わる若手メンバーが、気軽に発信・登壇できる場を作りたい！
と思って企画したのがこの若手限定LTイベントです。

そして今回は、Next-Gen Boostとの共同開催です！さらに盛り上がること間違いなし！

 

️イベント概要

  • 日時：2025/9/19（金） 18:30～

  • 会場：株式会社シグマクシス コラボレーションスペース
    〒105-0001 東京都港区虎ノ門４丁目１−２８ 13F
    マップ：https://www.sigmaxyz.com/ja/company/about.html

  • 対象：SAPに関わる若手メンバー（登壇も視聴参加も歓迎！）& SAPにかかわるベテランメンバー（見守って！）

  • 登壇形式：LT形式（5〜10分程度の発表）

  • 定員：登壇者 8名　参加者 30名

 

まずは登壇者を大募集！

「話してみたい！」と思ったその気持ちが、SAPコミュニティをもっと面白くします。
内容はSAPに関わることであれば、なんでもOK！
ツールの使い方、プロジェクトの工夫、勉強法、ちょっとした失敗談まで。
お気軽にエントリーしてください！

  • 発表形式：LT（5〜10分のライトトーク）

  • 発表テーマ例：

    • 「SAP BTP 初めてやってみた」
    • 「若手視点で見たSAPの○○」
    • 「こんなとき、どうしてる？業務の小ネタ」

📮登壇希望の方はこちら（リンク）からお申し込みください！

 

スペシャルゲスト

また、今回のイベントでは、

✨グローバルSAP Communityで"SAP Champion"に選出された tamiさん をゲストにお迎えします！

SAP Champion 紹介ページ

普段からtamiさんの発信に助けられている私たち、
SAP Champion かっこいいー！おめでとうございます！
の気持ちから、ぜひお祝いの場を作りたいと思い、お呼びしました。

そして、普段から気になっていた

  • どうしてそんなに発信できるの？
  • キャッチアップの時間ってどうやって確保しているの？
  • そもそもSAP Championってどうやってなるの？

といったことについてお聞きできたらな、と思っています。（※詳細はこれからご相談予定）

 

タイムテーブル（仮）

※これからちゃんと決めます！

時間 内容
18:30受付開始
19:00オープニング・趣旨説明
19:10LT①〜⑤（各5〜10分）
19:45スペシャルゲストトーク：tamiさん
20:10LT⑥〜⑧（希望者数に応じて調整）
20:40クロージング・告知など
21:00終了予定

 

こんな方におすすめ！

  • SAP関連の情報発信に興味があるけど、どこから始めていいかわからない
  • 同世代のSAP仲間とつながりたい
  • LTにチャレンジしてみたい
  • SAP Championの話を聞いてみたい！

 

参加者募集

登壇しない方の参加ももちろんOKです！
SAPを使っているけど他の人がどうしているか知りたい、
登壇に興味はあるけどまずは様子を見てみたい、
若手を温かく見守りたい、
そんな方のご参加をお待ちしています。

  • 参加申込フォーム：こちら

  • 費用：無料

  • 参加形式：現地参加

気になる方は、まずはカレンダーに予定の確保をお願いします。
そして、定員もあるのでぜひぜひ早めの申し込みをお願いします。

 

前回の開催レポート

以前（2020年）の「若手LT祭り」の雰囲気を知りたい方はこちら👇
👉SAPなんでもLT祭（若手編）を開催しました

 

さいごに

「話してみたい！」と思った方は、お気軽にご連絡ください。
初心者・初登壇、大歓迎です！

みなさんのご参加、お待ちしています！

entry.title: Re: How to post a PO condition value to inventory, GR/IR...

entry.title: Re: how to transition SAC on BW/4HANA to SAC on BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

In addition to Nikhil's recommendation regarding the BW portion of the equation, I suggest considering the licensing perspective for SAC. Starting January 2026, SAC and Datasphere current customers will no longer be able to renew independent SKUs; they will be required to calculate the required sizing in BDC CUs. Please have a look at the blog below.

"Existing SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud tenants will be preserved under SAP BDC, no technical migration required."

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/announcement-sap-datasphere-and-sap-analytics-cloud-availability-via-sap/ba-p/14140920

Hope it helps.

KR,

Pedro

entry.title: Re: Credit Exposure Update
entry.content:
Hi @fidel_yalle and everyone,

I’m using transaction UKM_COMMITMENTS to delete credit exposure line items, including a custom category Z01. The deletion works fine.

However, when I run the program UKM_RVKRED07 to rebuild the credit exposure, it does not update or include the Z01 category.

Is there a way to make UKM_RVKRED07 consider and update custom categories(Z01)? or please guide me if any enhancement option available to consider custom category Z01 while rebuilding.

Thanks,
Praveen Burra.

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: We have work packages in Professional services which are not hierarchy based. In EPPM project we can create WBS elements with hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: how to transition SAC on BW/4HANA to SAC on BDC
entry.content: That is good information. ^^

entry.title: Re: Contract Termination-Derecognition of contract not po...
entry.content:
Steps for Early Termination of Lease In Contract

 

  1. Add Notice rule (eg-19/05/2024) (RECN- Terms Tab)

                        -Activate Notice Rule

  1. Add time slice of the valuation rule with date of notice date + 1 day (RECN Valuation Parameters Tab)
    3. Release the new valuation rule (RECN- Valuation parameters Tab)
  2. Run the Valuation (RECN-Valuation tab)
  3. Run the Valuation Postings (RECEEP)

            -Retirement can be seen in the Asset explorer

            -Change in the useful life (automatically)

  1. Run the Depreciation
  2. Run the Lease Asset Deactivation Transaction (RECEASSETDEACT - Deactivate Leased Assets)

                        Prerequisites:

                                    -Depreciation should be completed fully

                                    -RERAPP/RECEEP should be completed for entire term of the contract

                                    -This cannot be run for the future dates

entry.title: Responding to AU CRFD with SAP Ariba and SAP Sustainability Solutions
entry.content:
Starting from the 1st of January 2025 as part of Australia’s Climate-related Financial Disclosure (CRFD) enactment, Australian companies will need to comply to a range of sustainability reporting requirements set out under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) and structured to Australian Accounting Standards Board (AASB) S2 Climate-related Disclosures, a standard aligning with the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) S2 framework.

One such reporting requirement is the disclosure of Scope 3 Category 1 Purchased Goods and Services (Scope 3.1) emissions. These are required in the second financial reporting year for each of the three entity groups impacted on a phased basis.

Companies already reporting to IFRS S2 will find it easier to comply to this new requirement. It was estimated that prior to the introduction of this climate-disclosure law, about 75% of ASX 200 companies have already reported in alignment with Task Force on Climate-Related Financial Disclosures (TCFD).

Who is impacted?

Both listed and unlisted entities are required to report their Scope 3 emissions from their second reporting year onwards with the first group commencing this from the 1st of July 2025 as their second reporting year (the first proportioned FY commencing January 2025 to June 2025 since the disclosure came into effect on 1st January 2025).

From the 1st of July 2025, the following companies that meet the eligibility criteria below are required to disclose Scope 3 emissions for their second year of reporting:

 

Meet at least two out of three criteria:

Or

National Greenhouse and Energy Reporting Reporters (NGER)

 

1.        Consolidated revenue of entities (and subsidiaries under its control) totaling $500 million or more.

2.        Consolidated total assets by the end of financial year totaling $1 billion or more.

3.        Employee count by end of financial year totaling 500 or more.

 

 

 

Companies that are registered under NGER to report and emit over 50 ktCO2 for the financial year for Scope 1 and 2 emissions under Section 13(1)(a).

 

And excludes Corporate Collective Investment Vehicles (CCIV), registrable superannuation entities or schemes.

From the 1st of July 2026, Group 2 entities will be required to disclose Scope 3 emissions in their second financial year (FY) of reporting:

 

Meet at least two out of three criteria:

Or

National Greenhouse and Energy Reporting Reporters (NGER)

Or

CCIVs, superannuation entities or registrable schemes.

 

1.        Consolidated revenue of entities (and subsidiaries under its control) totaling $200 million or more.

2.        Consolidated total assets by the end of financial year totaling $500 million or more.

3.        Employee count by end of financial year totaling 250 or more.

 

 

 

All other companies that are registered under NGER Act to report.

 

 

End of financial year (EOFY) assets of $5 billion or more.

 

Followed lastly by Group 3 entities on the 1st of July 2027 with mandatory Scope 3 reporting in the second FY:

 

Meet at least two out of three criteria:

1.        Consolidated revenue of entities (and entities under its control) totaling $50 million or more.

2.        Consolidated total assets by the end of financial year totaling $25 million or more.

3.        Employee count by end of financial year totaling 100 or more.

 

Australian guidelines for Scope 3 reporting in procurement

Scope 3 emissions reporting follows AASB S2, which is aligned with ISSB IFRS S2 with some differences to what is needed for reporting. The reporting framework seeks to be compatible with EFRAG European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) guidelines. Within procurement, Scope 3.1 are the main emission data sources that purchasing needs to collect and report on.

What emissions calculation standard does AU CRFD follow?

All calculations for Scope 3 emissions follow the GHG Protocol as the international standard. The exchange of supplier-specific Scope 3 emissions data within the context of procurement can be done according to the World Business Council Sustainable Development (WBCSD) PACT V2/V3 standards. A newer version launched by WBCSD on April 2025 (PACT V3) seeks to make Scope 3 emissions disclosures easier and more accurate. Businesses would need to purchase Lifecycle Assessment (LCA) databases to gain access to missing emissions data so that they can be calculated as averages.

NGER calculations for entities covered under the Act are primarily concerned with Scope 1 and 2 emissions, and the Australian Government provides free guidelines for these as National Greenhouse Account Factors.

How can Australian companies be prepared for reporting procured emissions?

Knowing the difference between AASB S2 and IFRS S2 is key, where AASB S2 does not require industry specific disclosures. IFRS S2 guidelines provide industry-specific approaches towards reporting. However, it is currently being proposed that industry-specific methodologies be incorporated in reporting under AASB S2 and is scheduled to be completed by 2030.

The following steps can be taken by procurement to comply with AU CRFD:

  1. Start with your suppliers: Assess their maturity and begin requesting primary emissions data. There are tools that procurement solution providers offer to facilitate the exchange and calculation of Scope 3.1 emissions data between buyers and suppliers.
  2. Expand to include activities (both goods and contracted services) that you do not own: Identify activities that contain the highest carbon intensity and other carbon hotspots across the value chain.
  3. Encourage submission of actual emissions: While LCA calculations can help fill in missing averages, meaningful actions to decarbonize can only work with actual emissions data.
  4. Carbon calculators that use GHG Protocol methods: Don’t have actual Scope 3.1 emissions data? This is when an LCA carbon calculator comes in.
  5. Collect, manage and report on this data: Once purchased Scope 3.1 emissions are collected, they should be clearly segmented against the other 15 categories of Scope 3 emissions. Companies have different ways of storing this carbon data and exporting this for reporting purposes. Buyers should select a solution that provides a single source of carbon truth that is easily reportable.
  6. Work with the right contacts at your company: Align on your sustainability purchasing goals with compliance, finance, supply chain and sustainability leaders in your organization.
  7. Begin engaging with auditors: Prior to the CRFD review period lapsing, companies should begin engaging with auditors to ensure compliance and accuracy of collected information. Once these processes are established, reporting should become easier as companies expand their sustainable procurement maturity and compliance.
  8. Communicate sustainable procurement policies to stakeholders: Convey how sustainable purchasing policies are followed to address stakeholder expectations and when being assessed on environmental, social governance (ESG) risks by institutional graders. If there are gaps in Scope 3 emissions, explain why and how the company can get this data in the future.

Why should companies report now rather than wait?

There is growing international pressure on companies to disclose their sustainability finance and spend performance to key stakeholders, whether they are large institutional investors or smaller shareholders, ESG scores are one component of a company’s ability to attract better financial capital-raising opportunities. Therefore, sustainability transparency is a growing expectation by stakeholders on companies. It allows firms to be become better prepared when responding to changes in ESG reporting requirements, rather than delay and rush to implement a suitable solution. 

Our surveys show that business leaders are keeping sustainability in mind with a long-term goal. Despite sustainability delays, it is forecasted that disclosures will become more stringent with companies having added pressures to act on climate change, reduce their reliance on finite energy sources and volatile fossil fuel supply chains, improve circularity on critical resources, and stamp out human rights abuses. This important step starts from procurement, and it is one of the reasons why sustainable procurement is important due to the downward pressures exerted by the buyer.

Interested in sustainability reporting solutions with SAP Ariba and SAP Sustainability solutions?

At SAP, we have a range of sustainable procurement, carbon finance and enterprise resource planning (ERP) solutions to help advance your organization’s sustainability reporting goals – providing an end-to-end reporting journey to help you comply to EFRAG ESRS, IFRS S/2 and AASB S2 sustainability reporting requirements. As well as helping customers comply to the Australian Modern Slavery Act of 2018 (Cth) through SAP Ariba supplier due diligence solutions.

Get in contact with an SAP representative today!

entry.title: Re: List of S4HANA Credit Management Reports, Tables & Some issues we faced in our recent S4HANA Imp
entry.content:
Hi @abprad ,

Thanks for the content.

Can we use below programs to update custom liability category Z01 in re-building process? we have custom liability category Z01, could you please suggest how to update Z01?

Thanks,
Praveen Burra

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content:
Hello, Shubham1!

Thank you for your comment.
I would like to ask you one more question.
In your comment, you told me you are working on Professional Service and couldn't made project with hierarchy but it possible on EPPM.
I'm confused with difference between Professional Service and EPPM.
Is it correct that Professional Service Projects are made with Project Management - Professional Service Project App. and EPPM Projects are made with Project Management - Enterprise Project App. ?

Best Regards.
Y_T

entry.title: Re: 🚀 SAP RAP Events: Custom Logic Without BAdIs or User Exits
entry.content:
@SimTshaba According to our Rules of Engagement, I have added the "GenAI Assisted Content" user tag to your post, as the content has been AI-generated.  
Transparency is key when it comes to AI, we therefore require that AI-generated content is marked as such: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content." 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Blog incorrectly displayed in Q&A section
entry.content: Thanks a lot for looking into this.

entry.title: Re: Equity Pickup - Group Reporting
entry.content:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/5d45da82c7fd4108b69ae344511b49be.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Compensation Information - Delimit Allowance record
entry.content:
I think this is a question for ECP forum as it sounds as though the Compensation module updated the EC values correctly and your issue is actually with the EC/ECP replication.  I suggest you tag ECP in your post.

Thanks, Christian

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone Free Sevice Plan limit reached
entry.content:
Hello Ben,

Please check this KBA if you haven't already https://me.sap.com/notes/0003434634

If you are sure you have assigned the launchpad_admin role to only one user in the month, then I suggest you create a case with SAP BTP support. You could start with the expert chat feature to get a quick response. 

Julius

entry.title: Re: When we do print priview on sales order getting error...
entry.content: It is because of timeout issue which should be increased if needed.  Check SAP note 3194576

entry.title: Re: RFQ Output Status Stuck at 'To be Output' in Manage R...
entry.content: Hello @shubhambankar, Could you please check if below KBA is helpful? 2793778 - Output Management for Manage RFQs - SAP Fiori & SAP S/4HANA https://me.sap.com/notes/2793778 Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: RFQ Output Status Stuck at 'To be Output' in Manage R...
entry.content:
Hello,


Could you please check if below KBA is helpful?
2793778 - Output Management for Manage RFQs - SAP Fiori & SAP S/4HANA


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: What is the best way to handle NZ Localisation to All...
entry.content: Thank you for your question. SAP is aware of the new Investment Boost requirement for New Zealand and has published the same via our Regulatory Change Manager (RCM) portal. For details on delivery timeline please refer to the portal. These details would be updated in RCM once we have finalized the delivery details.

entry.title: Re: Do you want to make your Iflow sleep or pause or delay for sometime?
entry.content:
Hi. Just a small input here. I don't think we need to get the message body explicitly and set it as a message body again (Lines 8 and 10).  The code works without these lines too. 

Also, getting the delay timing as a string input via a property and then converting it to an integer for Line 9 would be a nice addition as well. 

So that the delay timing could be kept configurable too.

entry.title: How to write a PCR for Offcycle Medical claim Income Tax calculation.
entry.content:
@Dear Team,

We have a requirement where, currently in the system, if a medical claim is provided to an employee in the off-cycle payroll, the income tax calculation takes place during the regular payroll run. However, the new requirement is that the income tax should be calculated in the off-cycle payroll itself when the medical claim is processed. For this purpose, I need to write a PCR. Kindly help me with the PCR logic for this scenario.

entry.title: Re: Payroll Error (T512W)
entry.content: I have attached a screenshot of screen T512W for your reference. Please review the attached image.

entry.title: Re: Cost Center-Functional area Field not editable
entry.content: Path to activate > SPRO - Financial Accounting (New) - Financial Accounting Global Settings (New) – Functional area for cost of Sales Accounting - Activate Cost of Sales Accounting for preparation

entry.title: [LOA] Position Information on employee profile show "Position" instead of "No data"
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

According to this KB Note: 2887055 - Position Information on employee profile show "no data" when using position right to return feature

I understood that position information on employee profile supposed to display "No data" while those users are on leave (LOA) 

Reproducing steps.
1. Go to employee profile who are now on leave (Employee Status = absent) 
2. Check Position Info portlet and found out that the position details (both position title and position id) displayed instead of "No data" 
3. Home> Company Info> Search for the position and confirmed that the position is on right to return correctly 

Does anyone know the reason behind of this behavior? where can I recheck from my side?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Application Frontend Service with standalone approuter
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake 

Thank you for exploring AFS to your cap application.

I don't see in package.json for deployment of afctl command of AFS service API endpoint.
https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/Application-Frontend-Service

Once you deployed, you will be able to see the URL of the cap bookshop application runing aftcl

Known issue : AFS deployed application is currently not displayed in HTML5 Applications for Trail Account

entry.title: Re: Equity Pickup - Group Reporting
entry.content: Please try to check the following link: https://help.sap.com/viewer/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/LATEST/en-US/0e5cca6e032d4430a3b11076e1d6ad96.html And also the document How to Configure EPU (§1.3.4) attached to the note 2659672 https://me.sap.com/notes/2659672

entry.title: Re: Is It possible to replicate custom MDF from EC to ECP...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Employee master data replication is driven by HRIS elements (such as Personal Information, Job Information, and Compensation), not through custom MDF objects. However, if you can update the HRIS elements based on MDF data and leverage the enhancement BADI within the employee data replication process, it may be possible to achieve the desired outcome.

Best of luck. 

Sanjay

entry.title: Technical object breakdown app.no data found. try adjusting the search or filter parameters
entry.content:
We are using the "Technical Object Breakdown" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Even after selecting a wide range of valid filters, the system shows:

 

"No data found. Try adjusting the search or filter parameters."

 

Steps tried:
- Used valid date ranges
- Verified breakdown maintenance notifications exist with malfunction start/end
- Checked that Breakdown indicator is selected
- Previewed relevant CDS views (C_TechnicalObjectBreakdown) in View Browser – still no data

 

Please advise whether any additional configuration or role/authorization is required.

 

Tenant: Customize tenant

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP Cloud Connector in High Availability Environments with Windows OS
entry.content: Very Nice explanation and helpful Blog.

entry.title: Re: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (ne...
entry.content: Hello @Sandra_Rossi, As a HANA expert rather than an ABAP expert, I conducted some research and found the following information for your reference: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenamdp.html Currently, AMDP only supports database procedures and functions from the SAP HANA database. It appears HANA SEQUENCE is not supported. (maybe I am wrong) Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: Subject: Link in Outlook Calendar Invite Not Loading...
entry.content: Hi PL1, Instead of loading the intended page, the calendar link consistently redirected to the same Approval Workflow Details page. However, we’ve now identified the root cause—the issue stemmed from our preview setting, which wasn't connecting properly to Outlook. This misconfiguration caused the calendar links to override and redirect to a default Workflow Details definition each time.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects BI 2029 is confirmed
entry.content:
Hi,

Will it be supported or integrated with SAP BDC ?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Como foi o primeiro SAP Meetup no Rio de Janeiro
entry.content: Foi bom demais estar com vocês!!!

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Hi Y_T,

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Professional services - Plan customer projects app ,EPPM - Enterprise projects-Project control app

entry.title: Battery Tech Driving Clean Energy
entry.content:
Hello,
Battery technology is revolutionizing the energy sector, enabling reliable storage of renewable power and reducing dependence on fossil fuels. This topic explores innovations like solid-state batteries, lithium-silicon cells, and flow batteries, highlighting their roles in electric vehicles, grid stabilization, and off-grid systems. We'll discuss environmental trade-offs, raw material sourcing, recycling strategies, and performance benchmarks. As countries transition to sustainable energy, understanding energy storage’s role in balancing supply and demand is key. Advancements in battery efficiency, safety, and scalability could unlock a future powered by clean, uninterrupted energy. This technology is vital for realizing climate goals and empowering global energy access. paybyplatema

Best Regards,
Julie Batson

entry.title: ABAP CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need help to analyze the standard CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001

When I open proivew in Eclipse I can see set of parameter define in this view.

But same CDS when I open in AFO or RSRT, I can see additional parameter (Like Ledger Fiscal year) which is mandatory and restrciting the output for the selection. PFA.

Please help me to identify where this additional parameter is maintained.

Thank You

Vinod

SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Data and Analytics SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content:
Hi Y_T, 
Yes, you are correct. Besides, you can make Professional Services projects in "Plan Customer Projects" and "Plan Internal Projects" apps directly.
Refer to help documents below.
Professional Services projects:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/29cf986299714386847f4d4c9bb86994/b102965653691e5ee10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US
EPPM:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/985c49588e0a0a02e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

Best regardfs,
Dianne

entry.title: Re: Need to know inf how quantities are calculated when c...
entry.content:
Couple of questions:-

  • Is GR posted for the second lot? if not, MIRO will consider PO quantity only
  • Is "GR-Based Invoice Verification" ticked in PO?

entry.title: Re: Plateau Report Designer LMS - Error dataset at initia...
entry.content:
Hello  @daniela_pontes63,

Firstly, you should have the Report_Developer role assigned to you. If this role is not assigned, kindly assign it to the admin account or if it is not available in your test instance raise a case with SAP to enable the same.

Then you can follow this KBA to connect PRD with LMS: 2171592 - Process to enable the use of Plateau/Learning Report Designer (PRD) - SAP for Me

The error you are facing is usually when you have not already connected PRD with LMS database.

 If this information helped you then please consider giving Kudos or accepting this post as solution.

Swapnil

entry.title: Re: PR Integration via WebService in CIG configured site
entry.content: Hello @JakubC2, can you please provide clarity on this request? Do you want to use web service integration for importing requisitions from a third party systems into Ariba and also use CIG to import requisitions from ERP into Ariba at the same time or do you want to use web service integration for importing requisitions from a third party systems into Ariba and use CIG to integrate the PO export request of this imported requisition to the ERP?

entry.title: Re: Set Master Warranty and warranty start date automatic...
entry.content:
Hello

we are facing the same issue. Is there already a solution for or how can this be solved?

regards

entry.title: Re: Ariba Collaboration Request Conditions
entry.content: The request is not possible out of the box. However, you can reach out to SAP Ariba services and explore customization feasibility to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content: I usually modify the Standard dictionary, exactly to avoid the issue described by the OP, because relying on content developers to select the correct dictionary has never been reliable mechanism. After customizing the Standard Recording Dictionary, I create a copy of it, so when SAP updates SEN, we can restore our customizations from this "backup".

entry.title: Re: Auto printing issue while adding marketing documents
entry.content: FYIP,

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to prevent deletion of requisitions by...
entry.content: This is unfortunately not possible both through out of the box configurations or through customizations as button actions like delete are hard coded and cannot be altered.

entry.title: Re: Technical object breakdown app.no data found. try adjusting the search or filter parameters
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Sales order change header data Partners tab
entry.content: Thanks Raymond for your response. I will get back to you on this.

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content: ...and apply the customizations to the Standard dictionary, so that content developers do not need to switch manually to the customized one. Now, when SAP Enable Now doesn't receive any further major updates, it might be the best and safest option. Of course, keep your custom dictionary as a "backup".

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to Setup Secure HTTP Inbound Connection with Client Certificates
entry.content:
Hello Durga 

please open a ticket on LOD-HCI-PI-CON-SOAP and share the details, like integration flow, user-certificate mapping etc.

Please note that the client certificate configuration directly in the integration flow is not the recommended option how to use client certificate authentication. 

Best regards

Mandy

entry.title: Re: Please tell me how to check which users IT Contact is...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check whether the following information solves your issue?

To check which user is currently set as the IT Contact in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can follow these steps:

Checking IT Contact in SAP for Me

  1. Log in to SAP for Me: Use your S-user ID or SAP Universal ID to log in.
  2. Access Systems & Provisioning Dashboard: Navigate to the ‘Systems & Provisioning’ section.
  3. View Assigned Tenants and Administrators: Identity and Access Management - Frequently Asked Questions Here, you can see the overview of the products you’re entitled to and check the Cloud Identity Services - Tenants overview to identify the IT Contact.

Other Ways to Check IT Contact

  • Cloud System Notification Subscription: You can subscribe to cloud availability notifications to receive updates regarding your SAP Cloud services, which might include information about the IT Contact.
  • Contact SAP Support: If you are unable to find the information through SAP for Me, you can create a support incident requesting details about the current IT Contact.

If you need to change the IT Contact, you can use the onboarding token or create a support incident with the subject ‘Request update to the Contact Person IT’. Identity and Access Management - Frequently Asked Questions

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Hi, Dianne. Thank you for your comment. Rely on your and Shubham's advice, I could finally done to make project with WBS hierarchy. Sincerely, Y_T

entry.title: Re: estricting Invoice Quantity Field to Whole Numbers in...
entry.content: Yes, this can be done. You will need to log a case and request the scale field on the Invoice class to be set to 0. If a decimal value is inputted on the quantity field, then the system will throw a hard stop error.

entry.title: Re: 【sap public cloud】BUSINESS_PARTNER POST ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check whether the following information solves your error?

Possible Causes and Solutions for the Error

The error message ‘Error while parsing an XML stream: BOM / charset detection failed’ suggests that there might be an issue with the character encoding or the presence of a Byte Order Mark (BOM) in the data being sent from Talend to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud API.

Causes:

  1. Character Encoding:

    • The data might be encoded in a format that is not expected by the API, such as UTF-16 instead of UTF-8.

  2. Byte Order Mark (BOM):

    • A BOM might be present at the beginning of the JSON data, which can cause issues during parsing.

Solutions:

  1. Check Encoding Settings:

    • Ensure that the JSON data is encoded in UTF-8, which is typically expected by APIs.

  2. Remove BOM:

    • If a BOM is present, remove it from the JSON data before sending it to the API.

  3. Validate JSON Format:

    • Double-check the JSON format to ensure it is correctly structured and matches the expected payload format for the API.

  4. Use Postman as a Reference:

    • Since the data works in Postman, compare the headers and body format used in Postman with those in Talend to identify any discrepancies.

Additional Tips

  • Debugging: Use logging or debugging tools in Talend to inspect the exact payload being sent and ensure it matches the successful request made in Postman.
  • Consult Documentation: Refer to the SAP API documentation for any specific requirements regarding data format and encoding.

By addressing these potential issues, you should be able to resolve the error and successfully add supplier master data using Talend.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: "Quantity could not be Changed from to" error when submitting the Ariba Purchase requi
entry.content: Can you please provide more information on the error message you are getting including screenshots?

entry.title: TCS 206C (1) on Purchase of goods
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

My client wants to do configuration regarding TCS on Purchase of Goods for 206C (1) with no threshold limit. I assigned TCS on withholding tax codes and even updated in master data in SAP public cloud but when I try to do testing in FB60, codes are not getting reflected. 

Can you please guide me how to do it.

Thanks, and Regards,
GR

entry.title: Re: Modify statement in a determination giving short dump...
entry.content: Thanks for the response but I also want to add the determination during update mode, is that not possible?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to obtain native SQL query that is exe...
entry.content:
Hi @YuriiPlakhtii,


I think you can find the SQL statement by enabling SQL trace in the target HANA database.
You can find more detailed steps about enabling SQL trace in KBA 2031647 - How to enable SQL Trace in SAP HANA Studio

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001
entry.content: I think belo wcode is adding the additinal parameter during run time. But then How can I modify it as I need to add column for previous year i.e user will enter Ledger Fiscal Year to get Amout restrcited to that Year, and I want to add one more parameter say Previous Year which will sho wthem previous year amount (2024). CUrrently it is filtering the whole data set for 2025 and no records of 2024 are getting in. @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE @Consumption.filter: { selectionType: #INTERVAL, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: true } @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'I_CalendarDate', resultElement: 'CalendarYear', binding: [ { targetElement : 'CalendarDate' , type : #PARAMETER, value : 'P_KeyDate' } ] } @AnalyticsDetails.query.variableSequence: 20 LedgerFiscalYear,

entry.title: SAP Ariba supplier accounts
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have one query related to supplier accounts on SAP Business network, where supplier A have multiple contacts like X,Y,Z.... but supplier A already connected with customer ABC with supplier contact X, so that in SLP 360 for supplier A , only one contact X is showing public other contacts Y,Z are showing private.

Here my question is, when a customer ABC invite a supplier A with contact Y for sourcing event, whether he needs to create another account to complete sourcing event or he use existing account to access event.

what If he create another account, the ANID will be same or different?

I believe that one supplier have one ANID which connect all supplier contacts.

entry.title: chillSAP × JSUG Next-Gen Boost 若手LT大会
entry.content:
※イベントの申し込み、詳細情報は以下ページより行ってください
https://community.sap.com/t5/tokyo-blog-posts/chillsap-next-gen-boost-%E8%8B%A5%E6%89%8Blt%E5%A4%A7%E4%BC%9A-%E9%96%8B%E5%82%AC/ba-p/14146560


日時：2025/9/19（金） 18:30～

会場：株式会社シグマクシス コラボレーションスペース
〒105-0001 東京都港区虎ノ門４丁目１−２８ 13F
マップ：https://www.sigmaxyz.com/ja/company/about.html

対象：SAPに関わる若手メンバー（登壇も視聴参加も歓迎！）& SAPにかかわるベテランメンバー（見守って！）

登壇形式：LT形式（5〜10分程度の発表）

定員：登壇者 8名　参加者 30名

entry.title: Re: External Supplier review/approval in Service Entry Sh...
entry.content: The only way this can be achieved is by creating a user ID for the supplier and then adding this user ID to the approval flow. Unfortunately, there is no existing functionality to allow a supplier to log in to Ariba, view the SES, and approve it before sending it to the buyer.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: File not archived correctly post processing
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In Production instance, message was processed and posted in SAP system via SAP-Integration Suite. However, the file was not archived correctly.

Due to these, SAP CPI continued to pick the file and try to process it again and again. The interface pricks triplet to process the file. The three files are filename.xml, filename.txt and filename.pdf. The last two files were archived by the filename.xml was not processed correctly. 

Error Details:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Error occurred during aggregation. Exchange[BF06DD831FBA19F-0000000000000002]. Caused by: [org.apache.camel.RuntimeExchangeException - Polling with given parameters did not return any message.], cause: org.apache.camel.RuntimeExchangeException: Polling with given parameters did not return any message.

These is the second time when the post processing of file was not done correctly by SAP CI. What could be the issue and how these can be averted.

 

Regards

Nageshwarnath Mishra

entry.title: Re: Unable to Find "SAP Analytics Cloud" under Service Ma...
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

Request SAC Trial Separately

SAP offers a 30-day SAC trial via this link:

  • https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/analytics-cloud/trial.html

regards,

Giri

entry.title: Re: Tool to secure HANA instances as per SAP checklists
entry.content:
Hi @VincentBerg,


>I just wanted to get the word out that there is a free and open-source tool available to help securing HANA instances as per the SAP provided checklists.
SAP does not offer any external separate tools for this purpose.
The link you found (https://www.anvilsecure.com/blog/introducing-hanalyzer.html) already provides a well-summarized overview of configurations that can be implemented to achieve high security.


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Automating Flat File Loads in SAP Datasphere Using Generic SFTP Connections
entry.content:
Hello @hudupa 

thanks a lot for this very helpful blog ... I would have needed this feature for a client of mine, already two years ago 😞

However... can you let me know a bit more about the topic of updating the file.

In case you have a SAP source system, like S4 or BW, and you create e.g. daily a new file via function module and store it on the SAP's file system (AL11), can you automate the load into DSP from there?

So, you won't need any Python or SAP Integration Suite for this use case, right?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Is It Possible to Change Price List Per Row in Sales Documents?
entry.content:
I have multiple price lists defined for my items, and I want to be able to change the price list at the row level in a sales order or sales quotation. However, the system only allows me to change the price list at the document level through the form settings.

Does anyone know if there's a way to change the price list per row in a sales document?

thanks in advance ,

Sadra

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAC Private Cloud into BDC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If you subscribe to BDC, it comes with  BDC cockpit, datasphere tenant and SAC Tenant along with sap data bricks.

you can navigate the SAC from BDC home page itself. if suppose you have separate SAC license you wanted to use, you can connect with BDC as well. 

*In your query you mentioned SAC Private cloud tenant. no such tenant available - all SAC licenses are public cloud only, as for us i am aware.

regards,

G

entry.title: Re: GR 相关配置问题咨询
entry.content: 请问老师，为什么重分类方法不要自定义呢？

entry.title: Refresh table after execute bound action
entry.content:
i have an RAP app on top of Public Cloud with multiple views (table) which show records with different status on each tab.

I have a bound action to select row/s to update the status.

The expectation is after action is executed, the status of the record will be change and the the current view will update making the record move to another view.

I've tried using side effects but it doesnt work. Is there a way to make the tables refresh after execute of bound action?


  side effects
  {
//tried both but doesnt work
    action updateStatus affects field Status;
    action updateStatus affects $self;
  }

entry.title: Re: TCS 206C (1) on Purchase of goods
entry.content: Check SAP note 3574318 for sales and 2977148 for Purchase

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Notes Note 3578900 - Multiple vulnerabilities in SRM Live Auction Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Would like to seek your expert advice as I received the following notes to implement in SRM.

"A priority "Very High" SAP Note/KBA has just been released on component SRM-LA

Note 3578900 - [CVE-2025-30012] Multiple vulnerabilities in SAP Supplier Relationship Management (Live Auction Cockpit)"

For your information, this functionality has not been used by the business for quite some time. Therefore, do we still need to implement the notes related to it. What is the impact to RFX process that currently being used?

entry.title: Not able to create sales order with reference of schedule agreement VA01
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Actually, I configured a new schedule agreement for one of our clients. Now they want to create a sales order with reference to the schedule agreement, but whenever we are given all the inputs and try to create in VA01 it while saving the order, the sales order is generated, but when we are trying to open it in VA02, the system is throwing an error message like the one below. So any experts, please guide me if I missed any configuration.

SD document 1031666 is not in the database or has been archived

Regard's,

Pavan Kumar

entry.title: Re: Reusable Logger Class in ABAP – Simple Logging in Reports
entry.content: Good summary of the challenges with the application log and how to address them.

entry.title: Re: ADSO's and Composite Providers are not visible in Ana...
entry.content: Thank you for this valuable information. The problem was solved when I checked “DisableBWDirectSearch” as you said. For friends who cannot locate Technical Configuration: File -> Analysis -> Customize Analysis -> Technical Configuration

entry.title: Plug in upgrade with Stack XML taking unwanted Non-ABAP component
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We want to update the GRC plug-in for our Satellite system. However, when we try to generate the stack XML, it includes a mandatory non-ABAP component that we cannot deselect. Our goal is to upgrade only the GRC plug-in (GRCPINW V1200_750 0023 SAPK-V1223INGRCPINW SAP GRC NetWeaver Plug-In) and not the other mandatory component (igs.helper).

entry.title: Re: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (ne...
entry.content:
Thanks. Fixed AMDP link (htm instead of html): https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenamdp.htm.

I guess the restriction in AMDP is more related to the following link (list of supported object types behind USING): https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abapmethod_by_db_proc.htm#!ABAP_ADDITION_4@4@.

"the following database objects must be specified after USING:

  • CDS entities, such as CDS view entities, CDS DDIC-based views (obsolete), CDS table functions, and CDS hierarchies, using the name of the CDS entity.
  • Database tables and DDIC views from the ABAP Dictionary using the name defined in ABAP Dictionary.
  • Procedures and functions managed by AMDP. An AMDP procedure or function is specified using the syntax class=>meth. Here, class is the name of its AMDP class and meth is the name of the AMDP procedure implementation or function implementation."

So, no possibility to use a sequence.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create sales order with reference of sche...
entry.content: When the scheduling agreement itself is enough and sales order is not required, to create an outbound delivery, what is the Business requirement to create sales order with reference to scheduling agreement? By the way, did you maintain copy control in vtaa for those document types?

entry.title: Re: I get an Error in Function Code. Is there a solution?
entry.content:
Hi,

As I don't have access to certain catalog objects, e.g OPDN, I am unable to test it directly.
After reviewing the code theoretically, I was wondering if you could please test the following changes to see if they work:

-------------------------------------
-- FIFO mantığı ile stok tahsisi yap
DECLARE cur_row CURSOR FOR SELECT * FROM :fifo_stock;

OPEN cur_row;
LOOP
FETCH cur_row INTO cur_row_row;
IF cur_row_row IS NULL THEN
CLOSE cur_row;
LEAVE;
END IF;

IF :remaining_qty <= 0 THEN
CLOSE cur_row;
LEAVE;
END IF;

DECLARE alloc_qty DECIMAL(19,6);

-- Kullanılacak miktarı belirle
IF :cur_row_row.RemainingQty >= :remaining_qty THEN
alloc_qty := :remaining_qty;
remaining_qty := 0;
ELSE
alloc_qty := :cur_row_row.RemainingQty;
remaining_qty := :remaining_qty - :cur_row_row.RemainingQty;
END IF;

-- Sonuç tablosuna ekle
result = UNION_ALL(
:result,
SELECT
:cur_row_row.DocEntry,
:cur_row_row.DocNum,
:cur_row_row.DocDate,
:cur_row_row.BaseEntry,
:cur_row_row.BaseLine,
:cur_row_row.Quantity,
:cur_row_row.UsedQty,
:cur_row_row.RemainingQty,
:alloc_qty AS AllocationQty
FROM DUMMY
);
END LOOP;
-------------------------------------


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Configure a Custom IAS IDP
entry.content: any solutions?

entry.title: Re: Building an Attachment Upload and Download Solution Using UploadSetwithTable Control
entry.content:
Hi @mikoaz ,

Could you please explain more? I didn't get your question - How could we get the plugins when we don't have CDS or HANA? 

If you mean you are using ABAP in the backend, then, of course, the same UI control can still be used, as UI5 technology is independent of the backend type; however, the implementation when sending the request may differ.
